entryType: direct entry into central hallway with immediate access to main living areas
kitchenLocation: centrally located with open connection to dining area and living room, featuring island layout
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with master bedroom separated on right side and two secondary bedrooms clustered on left side
bathroomPlacement: back-to-back bathrooms in center of plan sharing plumbing wall, with hall bath serving two bedrooms and ensuite serving master bedroom area
efficiencyNotes: open kitchen-dining-living concept maximizes perceived space
compact laundry area with stacked washer/dryer
island kitchen provides additional counter and storage
uniqueFeatures: covered patio extends living space outdoors
kitchen island with seating for casual dining
fireplace focal point in living area
dimensionNotes: rectangular 42'-3" x 23'-11½" footprint efficiently maximizes interior space; bedrooms are adequately sized for ADU standards; open living areas create spacious feel despite compact footprint
